message:
feat(cli): Update suggest, show, search commands to use OutputFormat system

- Refactored suggest.rs to use SuggestionOutput formatter with all 5 output
  formats (Human, Json, Jsonl, Plain, Tsv)
- Updated show.rs to use OutputFormat enum with proper dispatching
- Updated search.rs error handling to use output_format instead of robot_mode
- Added SuggestionContext and SuggestionItem exports to formatters module

Part of output format selection feature (meta_skill-hu66).
All 1421 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
